basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Manager-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar has released the official notification for 1 Project Manager-I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Gujarat. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D in Civil Engineering with specialization in Geotechnical Engineering
qualification.details: Ph.D in Civil Engineering with specialization in Geotechnical Engineering. The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications will be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onward and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Gandhinagar Project Manager-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Project Manager-I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Gandhinagar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. IIT Gandhinagar Project Manager-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Project Manager-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Manager-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Project Manager-I position at IIT Gandhinagar is 21st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Manager-I post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Project Manager-I post is a Ph.D. in Civil Engineering with a specialization in Geotechnical Engineering. Additionally, a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% in 10th and 12th are necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Manager-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Manager-I position is 35 years. Specific age relaxations may apply for certain categories as per government rules, which can be found in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Manager-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Manager-I position will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 60,000/- to Rs. 93,000/- per month, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Manager-I post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Manager-I position at the Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Manager-I recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Manager-I position at IIT Gandhinagar is a contractual job. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Gandhinagar, Gujarat, at the Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar campus.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
